description: Two-page executive summary tailored to buyer priorities and strategic value proposition
Detailed responses to all technical and functional requirements in the RFP
Completed security questionnaire or SIG/CAIQ responses as specified by the buyer
Privacy and data protection responses including GDPR/CCPA/FERPA compliance documentation
Completed pricing template or pricing narrative per buyer-specified format
Detailed project plan with timeline | milestones | staffing | and methodology
Three client references with contact information and relevance to the opportunity
Current SOC 2 Type II audit report (provided under NDA if required)
Certificates of insurance showing current coverage levels
Executed NDA if required by the buyer before proposal submission
Voluntary Product Accessibility Template documenting WCAG 2.1 AA conformance
Corporate background | financials | leadership | and organizational structure
Details of any subcontractors involved in delivery including qualifications and roles
Northstar standard terms and conditions or redlined buyer contract
Description of training approach | curriculum | delivery methods | and materials provided
Approach for migrating historical data from legacy systems to the Northstar platform
BC/DR plan summary including RTO | RPO | and failover procedures
Cross-reference matrix mapping each RFP requirement to the corresponding proposal section
